历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7559 → 8086 → 8188 → 10680 → 7436, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. In 2024, there was a significant decline (10680), while in 2025 it rebounded sharply to 7436. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 3200 places, with a baseline of approximately 7436 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 79 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 89 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 102, an increase of about 14.6% compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 41st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion and fire incident, which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 45th overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps or discontinuities have been recorded. It has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Systems Science A+, Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-. These align closely with the university's enrollment majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Transportation, providing strong attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with an estimated 252,000 in 2026 (based on total candidates of 393,700 × Physics Category proportion of about 64%), intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch was 426 points, slightly lower than 437 points in 2024, reflecting a slight adjustment in overall difficulty. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Hubei candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Hubei accounts for a small proportion (about 2–3%), typical of an out-of-province enrollment pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7436, intensified competition due to a 14.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in Hubei, a slightly negative reputation suppression, and sustained popularity of advantageous engineering majors, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8118, with a range of 7618–8618.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<7618), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
